title: Dynamic order_by with direction parameter
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_sorted/1` that takes a keyword list like `[by: :published_at, dir: :desc]` and returns posts ordered accordingly. Only `:title`, `:published_at`, and `:view_count` are valid sort fields; only `:asc` and `:desc` are valid directions. Use Ecto's `order_by` with a dynamic direction tuple — `order_by: ^[{dir, field}]`. Validate inputs or default to safe values. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Dynamic ordering via pinned keyword list is documented but uncommon. Must validate inputs and handle default fallback.
